signals.headline: $280M+ Drift Protocol Exploit on Solana Confirmed via Social Engineering** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[6]
signals.raw:
$280M+ Drift Protocol Exploit on Solana Confirmed via Social Engineering** | **NO** | **HIGH** confidence[6]

A major exploit on Solana's Drift protocol, involving social engineering and pre-approved transactions for administrative control, resulted in over $280M stolen, with Circle declining to freeze $230M+ in bridged USDC[6]. This has led to a 13% SOL price drop to ~$78, testing $75-80 support,
